title: carex stenophylla var. eleocharis
intro: Carex stenophylla var. eleocharis, also known as the needle sedge or Eleocharis sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carex stenophylla var. eleocharis include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
